---
title: "Mary Elizabeth Plumridge"
---

## Mary Elizabeth Plumridge

**Dates:** (1841-?1917)

### Description

daughter of Henry Plumridge, mistress of the Otterbourne National School in 1867

### Biography

She was a boarder at Elderfield during 1871 census, and invited to the servants’ Christmas party at Hursley Park in 1867. [PO Hants 1867; 1871 census]

 She was probably the mistress whose nose was put out of joint by the reforms to the school instituted by the Rev. [[person:478]W. F. Elgie]. She appears to have married (1873), James Bowden, a printer\'s manager.

### Letters

- Letter from Innocents day [28 December 1872]
- Letter from Jany 4th [1870]
- Letter from Jan 3d [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
